response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of C++ in recent roles, and their leadership experience is not focused on cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source contribution history with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated mentoring and workshop leadership in testing and software practices
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, AI-agent tooling)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience listed (NI LabWindows role), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform architecture or distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership for cloud or DevOps teams
